title: Updated ERA living guidelines on the responsible use of generative AI in research
content: Technical and targeted update of the ERA Living Guidelines on the responsible use of Generative AI in research with new recommendations and clarifications.
snippet: Technical and targeted update of the ERA Living Guidelines on the responsible use of Generative AI in research with new recommendations and clarifications.

title: EU prepares coordinated response to address the jet fuel supply situation as the conflict in the Middle East persists
content: Today’s Oil Coordination Group meeting gathered experts from the European Commission, EU countries, and the Energy Community secretariat to discuss the oil security of supply situation in Europe and how to best coordinate at EU level as the Middle East conflict continues.

title: EU, Brazil and China launch open coalition to boost integrity and effectiveness of carbon markets
content: The EU, Brazil and China have launched a new international coalition to strengthen the integrity, transparency and effectiveness of carbon markets worldwide, boosting global cooperation on carbon pricing and reinforcing support for the Paris Agreement and climate neutrality.

title: European Master's in Translation: winners announced for 'Your thesis in 3 minutes' contest
content: 10 European Master's in Translation students competed in a live online final to present their master's thesis in 3 minutes. Meet the 4 winners of the 2026 contest.
snippet: 10 European Master's in Translation students competed in a live online final to present their master's thesis in 3 minutes. Meet the 4 winners of the 2026 contest.

title: The EU boosts biotech leadership through breakthrough Parkinson’s gene therapy in Poland
content: A new STEP story highlights how EU support is helping advance an innovative gene therapy for Parkinson’s disease at Mazowiecki Szpital Bródnowski in Warsaw.
snippet: A new STEP story highlights how EU support is helping advance an innovative gene therapy for Parkinson’s disease at Mazowiecki Szpital Bródnowski in Warsaw.

title: Commission proposes new measures to fight poverty and improve lives of persons with disabilities
content: The European Commission has presented a bold social package to help end poverty in the EU and to strengthen the rights of persons with disabilities.
snippet: The European Commission has presented a bold social package to help end poverty in the EU and to strengthen the rights of persons with disabilities.

title: Boosting accessibility and inclusion for persons with disabilities
content: The Commission has presented an ambitious social plan to promote the rights of persons with disabilities across the EU.
snippet: The Commission has presented an ambitious social plan to promote the rights of persons with disabilities across the EU.

title: Commission proposes new measures to address poverty and the housing crisis
content: The Commission has proposed new measures to help eradicate poverty and address the housing crisis, including the first-ever EU anti-poverty strategy.
snippet: The Commission has proposed new measures to help eradicate poverty and address the housing crisis, including the first-ever EU anti-poverty strategy.

title: Commissioner Šuica travels to Ankara to discuss EU-Türkiye role in strengthening relations in Mediterranean region
content: Today, Commissioner for the Mediterranean, Dubravka Šuica, is in Ankara to exchange on EU-Türkiye cooperation and issues of shared interests for the wider Mediterranean region. Türkiye is a key partner for the European Union - geographically, strategically, politically, and economically.

title: Fighting housing exclusion and supporting independent living: the first-ever EU Anti-Poverty Strategy presented
content: The European Commission today unveiled the first-ever EU Anti-Poverty Strategy, together with a proposal for a Council Recommendation on fighting housing exclusion and reinforced action under the Strategy for the Rights of Persons with Disabilities.

title: 2026 European Sustainable Energy Awards: vote for your favourite finalist

title: Green Deal Projects Support Office final event: highlighting concrete pathways to accelerate Europe’s green transition

title: Commissioner Tzitzikostas meets aviation stakeholders to discuss modernising Europe's air traffic management

title: EU-Moldova High-Level Energy Dialogue: Renewed commitment to closer energy cooperation
content: The European Commission and the Republic of Moldova held today the 7th High-Level Energy Dialogue in Brussels, reaffirming their strong partnership on energy security and Moldova’s gradual integration into the European energy market.

title: Commission welcomes Serbia joining SEPA schemes, allowing for faster and cheaper euro transactions for citizens and businesses
content: Today, 18 banks in Serbia have officially joined the Single Euro Payments Area (SEPA) schemes.
snippet: Today, 18 banks in Serbia have officially joined the Single Euro Payments Area (SEPA) schemes.

title: Unlock Europe’s bioeconomy potential: Join the new Investment Deployment Group
content: The Commission is looking for experts to join the European Bioeconomy Investment Deployment Group, a new platform designed to accelerate funding for sustainable, bio-based innovation.
snippet: The Commission is looking for experts to join the European Bioeconomy Investment Deployment Group, a new platform designed to accelerate funding for sustainable, bio-based innovation.

title: EU and Syria meet to take their relations and cooperation forward
content: On Monday, 11 May, the European Union and the Syrian Transitional Authorities will convene two high-level meetings in Brussels to reinforce EU-Syria relations and discuss ways to support Syria's socio-economic recovery, reconstruction, and long-term stability.

title: Side by Side: Testimonials of EU and non-EU citizens working together
content: EU businesses face labour shortages across many sectors. Workers from outside the EU are helping to fill this gap. Side by Side video series show how non-EU workers contribute their skills to EU businesses, helping address labour shortages through successful training and integration.

title: Commission publishes guidance to support EU transport sector affected by the Middle East crisis
content: The Middle East crisis continues to affect Europe’s transport and tourism sector, notably through disruptions to fuel supply and the closure of certain air and shipping routes.
snippet: The Middle East crisis continues to affect Europe’s transport and tourism sector, notably through disruptions to fuel supply and the closure of certain air and shipping routes.

title: Commission approves €5 billion German State aid scheme to support decarbonisation of industry
content: The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, a €5 billion German scheme to help companies in industrial sectors decarbonise their production processes.
snippet: The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, a €5 billion German scheme to help companies in industrial sectors decarbonise their production processes.

title: Top scientists to identify future members of European Research Council’s Scientific Council
content: The six members of the Identification Committee will oversee the renewal of the Scientific Council for Horizon Europe 2028–2034.
snippet: The six members of the Identification Committee will oversee the renewal of the Scientific Council for Horizon Europe 2028–2034.

title: EU and Jordan step up delivery of their strategic partnership through €135 million financing agreements

content: Stakeholders are invited to provide feedback within one month via the Have Your Say portal.

title: Protecting public spaces from terrorist threats in Senegal
content: The EU project Public Spaces+ worked with Senegalese partners to design a total of nine specialised training programmes in the country, which aim to strengthen training and operational capacities in key areas fundamental to the protection of public spaces against terrorist attacks.
